current_milestone: Phase G.4 (The Gauntlet) complete — in-memory branch snapshots + replay CLI verified
notes: Phase G.4 end-to-end verified. gauntlet_branch demo clones a weavory state at T0, then main and branch diverge (main AAPL=110 spike, branch AAPL=90 dip); recall on each returns different values; main recall(as_of=T0) rewinds to the original [100]. Demo exports an incident; gate_gauntlet.sh invokes `weavory replay --from <incident>` and asserts both AAPL=100 and AAPL=110 surface in the rehydrated state. Vitest 103/103 green. gate_gauntlet.sh 6/6. Phase-1 regression (Gates 3/4/5) + Gate Commons + Gate Wall all re-run green. Five-tool MCP API unchanged; CLI gained replay subcommand only.
